description:
**fz-dps.C3**: lower Term::Call / Term::CallClosure under Dst ABI.

**What**: at a non-tail callsite where the callee's `return_reprs[callee_sid] == Dst(k)` and the caller has an eligible dst slot, pass the dst as an extra arg; cont receives `()` instead of an FzValue. Otherwise the callsite stays uniform (today's path).

**Eligibility**: at each non-tail Call site, codegen already resolves the callee sid via `spec_registry.resolve(callee_id, &arg_descrs)` (ir_codegen.rs:4195 today). Read `return_reprs[callee_sid]`; if it's `Dst(k)`, lower under the Dst ABI. Otherwise the callsite stays uniform. Per the q9g.26 audit, this is simpler than routing through `Module.callsite_outcomes` (which is the typer/reducer's log, not the primary index for codegen).

**Caller-side allocation**: when callee is Dst(k) and caller has no upstream dst to forward (non-TRMC site), caller emits `alloc_<k>` from Cheney (RC arena comes later in B-arc) and passes that as the dst arg. The result lifetime is owned at the caller frame.

**Why this lands before q9g.3**: q9g.3 (MakeList DPS + Return wire + gate flip) needs C3 already present so that recursive calls inside DPS-shaped fns find a Dst-aware Call lowering when q9g.3 flips the gate.

**Testability without classifier output**: q9g.2's gate is still off in production at this point, so no real spec gets Dst. Test exercises C3 by `cfg(test)`-toggling the q9g.2 gate within a unit test, synthesizing a Dst spec, and asserting the lowered CLIF passes the dst arg and skips return-path materialisation.

**CLIF impact**: zero in production builds (no Dst spec exists yet); test-only assertions verify the lowering shape.

**Removes**: nothing yet (uniform path stays intact for non-Dst specs).

**Precondition**: q9g.2 (gated classifier must exist so tests can opt-in to a Dst spec).

comments.text: subsumed by fz-q9g.3 (CD-bundle): wire ABI cannot land without a constructor demonstrating it

Rewritten 2026-05-18: split out of the old CD-bundle. Lands the C3 handler against the q9g.2 gate (still off in production); test exercises it by cfg(test)-toggling the gate. Eligibility lookup rides Module.callsite_outcomes from fz-9pr/fz-f88.

title: fz-dps.C3: lower Term::Call/CallClosure under Dst ABI
